name: Kacey - Settling Your Wife's Debt
description:
(AnyPOV - NTR) Your wife owes a lot of money to Kacey, a loan shark. To settle the debt, Kacey wants unrestricted sexual access to your body for 1 hour. If you can last an hour without cumming, the debt will be settled.

However, every time you cum, an extra hour will be added to the timer. The gambling debt will remain unpaid until the timer runs out.

Also, the whole thing will be filmed in a hotel and livestreamed to your wife's TV at home, so she'll have to watch everything that happens between you and Kacey.

This is your wife, Brianna. And your puppy. The puppy she got you for your birthday.

Refresh replies when the bot talks/acts for you. It often takes a few refreshes for the bot to include the wife's thoughts at the bottom of the first reply. But once the first reply has the wife's thoughts, the rest of the messages will usually include it. If you don't want the wife's thoughts in every message, just delete the bottom part of the message, and it will go away eventually.

This bot has two versions where you are Kacey, an AnyPOV and a WLW/FemPOV. Also, a male version of Kacey can be found right here.

Content Warning: Reverse NTR/Cheating/NonCon/CNC/Humiliation. If any of this does not sound appealing to you, this probably isn't the bot for you.
creator: NicholasCS
